retrospective.harder_than_needed: The masking-trap's close-then-reopen-fresh-context re-join is unprecedented in the suite and initially failed 100%: closing the whole BrowserContext destroys the invitee's KeyPackage SECRET material in IndexedDB, so no fresh context can ever complete the join ('No matching secret found'). Fix: close only the Page (masking-trap intact, no live JS) while the Context's IDB survives. Also: the profile-page invite path (S8) surfaced a pre-existing product bug — the Add-to-Group success Alert is gated on addableGroups.length>0 and unmounts the instant the invite makes the contact a member, so the success confirmation is structurally unreachable in the single-addable-group case (filed BACKLOG profile-page-add-group-success-confirmation; e2e gates on the real outcome instead).
retrospective.surprised_by: Closing a Playwright BrowserContext silently destroys the invitee's MLS KeyPackage secret material — a fresh same-identity context can never complete a pending join.
